content: We can integrate HippoRAG2's human-like hippocampus-inspired contextual memory architecture into an ICM curiosity-driven autonomous agent, enabling the agent to store structured, contextually rich memories of previously explored environments and hypotheses instead of discarding episodic exploration data. This allows the agent to avoid redundant exploration of familiar low-reward regions and direct intrinsic curiosity toward truly novel, high-information-gain gaps in its existing memory map, boosting long-term autonomous exploration efficiency.
